channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 16 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-33744 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
BentoML is a Python library for building online serving systems optimized for AI apps and model inference. Prior to 1.4.37, the `docker.system_packages` field in `bentofile.yaml` accepts arbitrary strings that are interpolated directly into Dockerfile `RUN` commands without sanitization. Since `system_packages` is semantically a list of OS package names (data), users do not expect values to be interpreted as shell co...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33744
 
🚨 CVE-2026-21724 - Grafana
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
A vulnerability has been discovered in Grafana OSS where an authorization bypass in the provisioning contact points API allows users with Editor role to modify protected webhook URLs without the required alert.notifications.receivers.protected:write permission.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-21724
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CISA: New Langflow flaw actively exploited to hijack AI workflows
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is warning that hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability identified as CVE-2026-33017, which affects the Langflow framework for building AI agents.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-new-langflow-flaw-actively-exploited-to-hijack-ai-workflows/
 
🚨 CVE-2026-23396 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: wifi: mac80211: fix NULL deref in mesh_matches_local() mesh_matches_local() unconditionally dereferences ie->mesh_config to compare mesh configuration parameters. When called from mesh_rx_csa_frame(), the parsed action-frame elements may not contain a Mesh Configuration IE, leaving ie->mesh_config NULL and triggering a kernel NULL pointer dereference...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23396
 
💣 LangChain, LangGraph Flaws Expose Files, Secrets, Databases in Widely Used AI Frameworks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed three security vulnerabilities impacting LangChain and LangGraph that, if successfully exploited, could expose filesystem data, environment secrets, and conversation history. Both LangChain and LangGraph are open-source frameworks that are used to build applications powered by Large Language Models (LLMs).
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/langchain-langgraph-flaws-expose-files.html
 
💣 Ajax football club hack exposed fan data, enabled ticket hijack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Dutch professional football club Ajax Amsterdam (AFC Ajax) disclosed that a hacker exploited vulnerabilities in its IT systems and accessed data belonging to a few hundred people.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ajax-football-club-hack-exposed-fan-data-enabled-ticket-hijack/
 
📰 Dutch Police discloses security breach after phishing attack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Dutch National Police (Politie) says a security breach resulting from a successful phishing attack has had a limited impact and hasn't affected citizens' data.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/dutch-police-discloses-security-breach-after-phishing-attack/
 
📰 Bearlyfy Hits Russian Firms with Custom GenieLocker Ransomware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A pro-Ukrainian group called Bearlyfy has been attributed to more than 70 cyber attacks targeting Russian companies since it first surfaced in the threat landscape in January 2025, with recent attacks leveraging a custom Windows ransomware strain codenamed GenieLocker. "Bearlyfy (also known as Labubu) operates as a dual-purpose group aimed at inflicting maximum damage upon Russian businesses;
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/bearlyfy-hits-70-russian-firms-with.html
 
📰 In Other News: Palo Alto Recruiter Scam, Anti-Deepfake Chip, Google Sets 2029 Quantum Deadline
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: SecurityWeek
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Other noteworthy stories that might have slipped under the radar: Heritage Bank data breach, new State Department unit tackles cyber threats, LA Metro disruptions.
Link: https://www.securityweek.com/in-other-news-palo-alto-recruiter-scam-anti-deepfake-chip-google-sets-2029-quantum-deadline/
 
📰 Ransomware - what is it, how to answer to ransomware threats, ransomware detection - Acronis
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Acronis
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Acronis, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5NQWxQVzhEZ1BvS2FuOXdQZHpQZlA4bDBTVlRHdzBFZU5MZ3JFbUhSWXJfb0tGeE9Tc2lYVGJpc0RwZWYwOFl4QmdIT19PaGJNclVQYWlfYWJCbTRoRmc?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-22523 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.1
Resumo:
Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in themepassion Ultra WordPress Admin ultra-admin allows Reflected XSS.This issue affects Ultra WordPress Admin: from n/a through <= 11.7.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-22523
 
🚨 USN-8098-9: Linux kernel (IBM) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Security Module (LSM). An unprivileged local attacker could use these issues to load, replace, and remove arbitrary AppArmor profiles causing denial of service, exposure of sensitive information (kernel memory), local privilege escalation, or possibly escape a container. (LP: #2143853) Several security issues were discovered in the Li...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8098-9
 
🚨 USN-8128-1: CryptX vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that CryptX did not verify authentication tags while performing GCM and ChaCha20-Poly1305 decryption. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause CryptX to accept modified ciphertext, leading to data integrity violations or authentication bypass. (CVE-2018-25099) It was discovered that CryptX included a version of the tomcrypt library that was susceptible to malformed unicode handling. An att...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8128-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-33623 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.7
Resumo:
PinchTab is a standalone HTTP server that gives AI agents direct control over a Chrome browser. PinchTab `v0.8.4` contains a Windows-only command injection issue in the orphaned Chrome cleanup path. When an instance is stopped, the Windows cleanup routine builds a PowerShell `-Command` string using a `needle` derived from the profile path. In `v0.8.4`, that string interpolation escapes backslashes but does not safely...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33623
 
🚨 CVE-2026-33726 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
Cilium is a networking, observability, and security solution with an eBPF-based dataplane. Prior to versions 1.17.14, 1.18.8, and 1.19.2, Ingress Network Policies are not enforced for traffic from pods to L7 Services (Envoy, GAMMA) with a local backend on the same node, when Per-Endpoint Routing is enabled and BPF Host Routing is disabled. Per-Endpoint Routing is disabled by default, but is automatically enabled in d...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33726
 
📰 Security alert for BuddyBoss WordPress users following update server breach - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a WordPress, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Joe Kent Alleges FBI Halted Charlie Kirk Investigation Before Counterterror Teams Could Track Pre-Attack Intelligence - International Business Times UK
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPUnpJcGUxVXNBeEw5bDg5MlRjVS1mV0ZpbnllV1E0U0ZYeDR4X3dJamtzYTdLRGp1dXRTNGVHLU1IWndFVDZfZHByUFBfbFoyRVdJOHBtVXRUcFg3cVlWeE1uOHNVd3dDaGZESWc0Tk9qODFVRlZ1QW51XzR5akVNYVdEMUFNRjRaZ3NWYU5wdnN1SWU4VDJEVTkyQkktWjg?oc=5
 
📰 XRP USD Price Outlook: Ripple Fails to Breach $1.60, What Next? - Coinspeaker
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 1.6
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBWNG5YclFUb3kyLU1ydjd0NDBTMFpIUUR2WlI0Z3hkMTQwWEhLRU5SNXM2Q2FCc1B1LXF0bDVNQjd3eFBiMnFQUmJnZnpNR01pZzR2cEt2VkN3bGZsUXVz0gFkQVVfeXFMTVNlcEZPSVZRR1J3QzJtZ1Q2NnMwT2UwazJlcks4N0VZLWhQY3B2QzNDWDhsdEJTbXQ4Z1lyYlVVeEwwaDFITjVDaTNtd1FVQU5lQ25tOTdWaDNKcWJ4Mkpzb2NuYQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 25/03/2026 até 27/03/2026.
